pages.title: Knit Rescue
pages.description:
Navigate tangled yarn mazes by strategically pulling threads to free captured characters in this puzzle rescue game. Players manipulate interconnected stitches and loops while managing limited moves to unravel complex knit patterns. Each stage presents unique knitting challenges that demand precise untying skills to complete the rescue before running out of turns.

Key Features

• Thread manipulation mechanics  
• Limited move puzzle structure  
• Progressive stitch complexity  
• Time-limited rescue challenges  
• Yarn-based maze environments
